title: floscopa africana subsp. africana
intro: Floscopa africana subsp. africana, also known as the African grassleaf floscopa, is a species of flowering plant in the family Commelinaceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Floscopa africana subsp. africana include its ability to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and fight off infections. Herbal preparations of Floscopa africana subsp. africana typically involve making a decoction from the roots or leaves of the plant, which can be consumed as a tea or used as a topical application.
